channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Conservative activist reaches 'breaking point' with Google
item.description: The Fox News AI Newsletter delivers the latest developments form the world of artificial intelligence, including the technology's challenges and opportunities.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lego just announced its official Black Friday sale - here are 11 early deals I'd buy right now
item.description: Lego’s own Black Friday deals event is officially returning for 2025, and with it, you can expect major discounts on sets that only Lego sells – but in the lead-up, you can save on these 12 deals from Lego and other retailers.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Krol, TechRadar

item.title: In a California farming region, researchers are mapping rural heat to protect farmworkers
item.description: In the summers, the sky is jet black when Raul Cruz arrives at this Imperial Valley sugarcane field to start his day. He chops, cleans and bundles the crop, taking heed as the sun rises. It's hard work, but so is starting at 4 a.m.
item.dc:creator: DORANY PINEDA and JAE C. HONG, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: The iPhone 18 Pro could come with a big Starlink upgrade – and it sounds perfect for off-grid adventures
item.description: We're starting to hear a few rumors around what Apple may have planned for the next set of flagship iPhones.
item.dc:creator: David Nield, TechRadar

item.title: Microsoft has allegedly tasked Xbox to deliver a 30% profit margin, and if true, it could explain the reason behind its price hikes and mass layoffs
item.description: Xbox's job cuts and price increases could be due to a push from Microsoft to achieve a 30% profit margin.
item.dc:creator: Rhys Wood, TechRadar

item.title: Musk's rollercoaster year: From boycotts and plunging earnings to a potential trillion-dollar payday
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — If someone left a government job with a black eye, literally, ran a company with shrinking profits, and suddenly had federal investigators crawling over their business, you might say they’re having a bad year. But most people are not Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: BERNARD CONDON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Reddit sues Perplexity, three other firms, for AI scraping
item.description: Reddit this week filed suit against Perplexity and three other companies — Oxylabs UAB, AWM Proxy, and Serp Api — for allegedly engaging in so-called AI scraping without authorization.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Dinosaurs were thriving in North America before the mass-extinction asteroid strike, study suggests
item.description: New research suggests that dinosaur populations were thriving in North America before the asteroid impact 66 million years ago that caused mass extinction.
item.dc:creator: Christina Larson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump's surgeon general pick set for virtual confirmation hearing
item.description: The Senate Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions (HELP) will hold a virtual confirmation hearing over the nomination of Casey Means to be U.S. surgeon general next week, five months after she was nominated.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Choi, The Hill

item.title: AI is about to upend Google’s AdWords cash cow
item.description: Twenty-five years ago, Google unveiled Adwords, which pledged to enable advertisers “to quickly design a flexible program that best fits [their] online marketing goals and budget,” Google cofounder Larry Page said at the time. The principle was simple.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Copilot is getting a major upgrade and Microsoft is hoping Mico makes you forget you ever met a Clippy
item.description: Microsoft's Copilot Fall 2025 Update is set to transform the AI experience across Windows, the Copilot app, and Edge.
item.dc:creator: Lance Ulanoff, TechRadar

item.title: How AI can produce detailed storm surge forecasts faster and save lives
item.description: Hurricanes are America’s most destructive natural hazards, causing more deaths and property damage than any other type of disaster. Since 1980, these powerful tropical storms have done more than US$1.5 trillion in damage and killed more than 7,000 people. The No.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: What Americans think about the environmental impact of AI, according to a new poll
item.description: A new poll finds that as the United States rapidly builds massive data centers for the development of artificial intelligence, many Americans are concerned about the environmental impact.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Mcdermott And Linley Sanders, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: AI helps IT teams resolve incidents faster, report finds
item.description: New data suggests that generative artificial intelligence (genAI) is delivering measurable benefits for IT organizations and their IT Service Management (ITSM) efforts.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Meta cutting 600 AI jobs even as it continues to hire more for its superintelligence lab
item.description: MENLO PARK, Calif. (AP) — Meta Platforms is cutting roughly 600 artificial intelligence jobs even as it continues to hire more workers for its superintelligence lab, the company confirmed on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Florida test scores rise, attendance improves after cellphone ban
item.description: A new study finds that Florida test scores rose and attendance improved after a school cellphone ban, although short-term disciplinary problems also arose in the state.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, The Hill

item.title: Intel’s Panther Lake chip could allow Windows 11 to morph into an agentic OS
item.description: Intel’s upcoming “Panther Lake” processor for AI PCs could be a key building block in the transition of Windows 11 into an AI agent-driven OS, analysts said this week. Panther Lake will be available in PCs starting early in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: F5 hack highlights persistent supply chain security concerns
item.description: The F5 breach targets a "foundational technology" relied upon by government agencies and critical infrastructure operators. The post F5 hack highlights persistent supply chain security concerns first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Netflix blames tax dispute in Brazil for rare quarterly earnings letdown
item.description: Netflix missed the earnings target set by stock market analysts during the video streamer’s latest quarter, a letdown that the company blamed on a tax dispute in Brazil. The results announced Tuesday broke Netflix's six-quarter streak of posting a profit that eclipsed analysts' projections.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: OpenAI launches web browser ChatGPT Atlas: How to start using it
item.description: OpenAI announced Tuesday it is launching a ChatGPT-powered web browser called Atlas that will compete directly with widely used Google Chrome.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, WGN 9

item.title: The lost 30 years: The decline of Japan’s semiconductor industry
item.description: Global industrial competition has entered an era in which “whoever controls semiconductors controls the future.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Unlocking efficiency with AI, commercial software and the cloud
item.description: Government agencies are already exploring opportunities to apply artificial intelligence to their operations in ways that increase efficiency and save money. The post Unlocking efficiency with AI, commercial software and the cloud first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Riverbed tackles AI data bottleneck with new Oracle-based service
item.description: Riverbed recently unveiled Data Express Service, a SaaS offering the company developed in partnership with Oracle that is designed to address the challenge of securely moving massive datasets quickly.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: AWS DNS error hits DynamoDB, causing problems for multiple services and customers
item.description: Monday got off to a bad start for Amazon Web Services users served by the company’s US-EAST-1 region, when a DNS problem rendered the DynamoDB API unreliable, with consequences for many AWS services and customers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Amazon cloud outage resolved after downing dozens of major websites, apps
item.description: Amazon Web Services provides infrastructure for many big-name companies, as well as state and local governments.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: China accuses US of cyberattack on national time center
item.description: BEIJING (AP) — China on Sunday accused the U.S. National Security Agency of carrying out cyberattacks on its national time center following an investigation, saying any damage to related facilities could have disrupted network communications, financial systems and power supply.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Teens turning to AI for love and comfort
item.description: Survey of 1,000 students shows teens using AI for personal relationships while two-thirds of parents remain unaware of their children's AI usage.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Safety app Citizen to pay users to go live on the platform
item.description: The company posted a social media update, alerting users that they could now be paid for live-streaming incidents that occur around them.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Euzarraga, NewsNation

item.title: Tesla's self-driving cars under fire again
item.description: Tesla's Full Self-Driving system faces federal investigation following 58 reports of crashes, with six vehicles running red lights before colliding with other cars.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
